title: (Bearish Signal) XBIT, price exceeded its 50-day Moving Average on May 24, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a sell signal for investors. A.I.dvisor found 42 similar cases, and 36 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 86%. Current price $17.15 crossed the support line at $17.39 and is trading between $17.39 support and $15.89 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/22/21 - 05/24/21, the price experienced a +1% Uptrend, while the week of 05/17/21 - 05/24/21 shows a -0.81% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/xt6ltgwgm9171.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=dcab56d4ee42988fb471e94f29f44c45c6cc9dc4

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. In 51 of 61 cases where XBIT's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 84%.

The 50-day Moving Average for XBIT moved below the 200-day moving average on May 03, 2021. This could be a long-term bearish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where XBIT declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 78%.

XBIT broke above its upper Bollinger Band on April 28, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

The Aroon Indicator for XBIT entered a downward trend on April 29, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.
